chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1519 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 08.11.2016. Mr. Ali Asghar Chang, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Mr. Abdul Sattar Sarki, Advocate for respondents No.5 to 9. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w SIP Niaz Muhammad Khoso SHO P.S Kaloi District Badin. = Today, Mst. Saeeda, the petitioner appeared in person and when asked about her will and wish, she specifically stated that she wants to go with her parents. Both private respondents No.5 & 6-Saiful and Mst. Haleeman, who are father and mother of the petitioner, are present today and undertake that they will take good care of their daughter Mst. Saeeda. The petitioner further states that she never married with a person namely Khuda Bux, who is also present in person today. This petition is disposed of by allowing the petitioner Mst. Saeeda to go with her above named parents as well as with specific directions to the police officials that if petitioner or her family members approach them for protection, the same should be provided to the petitioner and her family members, particularly her parents. Today, SHO of P.S Kaloi District Badin is present in person, who is directed to accompany the petitioner and her parents to their residence. The official respondents are further directed to provide legal protection to the petitioner and her family and when they are approached for lodging any complaint agaisnt the above named Khuda Bux and his family members, the same shall be dealt with strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
